data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. LOU'S BEACH is racing in great heart with two wins and two minor placings from the past four outings. Went close again last time over 1609m at this track, finishing second and 4 metres from the winner. Meets a comparable field and he is a strong winning hope. 1. DISMAS is in the mix following a respectable third at his most recent appearance over 1609m at this track. 8. SHAKE IT is in the mix following a respectable second at his most recent appearance over 1609m at this track.","runners":[4,1,8],"exclusive":false}
